texto: As for my studies in school, I was a solid student. I was strong in English and Latin, but I got lost anytime the subject included math. texto: Why is it amazing that I don’t act my age? Why should I act my age? Or more to the point, how is someone my age supposed to act? Old age is part fact, part state of mind, part luck, and wholly something best left for other people to ponder, not you or me. Why waste your time? I don’t.
